requirement_topic.en: Bilingual English/French Markings, Instructions, and Consumer Information
requirement_topic.zh: 英法双语标识、说明书及消费者信息
requirement_topic.zht: 英法雙語標識、說明書及消費者資訊

summary.en: Canada-market EV charger labels, warnings, instructions, app prompts, packaging, warranty information, and consumer-facing safety statements may need English and French content under federal consumer-packaging rules, provincial language rules, certification-body requirements, procurement requirements, and Quebec-specific French-language obligations where applicable. Electrical safety markings required by a certification body are commonly reviewed as part of Canadian certification or field evaluation.
summary.zh: 加拿大市场电动汽车充电设备标签、警告、说明书、应用提示、包装、保修信息及面向消费者的安全声明，可能需依据联邦消费者包装规则、省级语言规则、认证机构要求、采购要求以及适用的魁北克法语义务提供英语和法语内容。认证机构要求的电气安全标识通常会在加拿大认证或现场评估过程中审查。
summary.zht: 加拿大市場電動汽車充電設備標籤、警告、說明書、應用提示、包裝、保固資訊及面向消費者的安全聲明，可能需依據聯邦消費者包裝規則、省級語言規則、認證機構要求、採購要求以及適用的魁北克法語義務提供英語和法語內容。認證機構要求的電氣安全標識通常會在加拿大認證或現場評估過程中審查。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act and Regulations, where applicable
Provincial language legislation, including Quebec French-language requirements where applicable
Certification-body marking and instruction requirements for Canadian electrical approval

summary.en: China-market chargers commonly provide Simplified Chinese labels and manuals, sometimes with English export text. That documentation is not sufficient for Canada where English/French content, Canadian certification marks, Canadian ratings, warnings, and installation instructions may be required.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电设备通常提供简体中文标签和说明书，有时附带英文出口文本。对于加拿大而言，这类文件通常不足，因为可能需要英法双语内容、加拿大认证标志、加拿大额定值、警告及安装说明。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電設備通常提供簡體中文標籤和說明書，有時附帶英文出口文本。對於加拿大而言，這類文件通常不足，因為可能需要英法雙語內容、加拿大認證標誌、加拿大額定值、警告及安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: China domestic labelling and instruction requirements
GB/T product marking and manual practices for EV charging equipment

gap.en: The documentation gap is usually visible late unless planned early: warnings, installer instructions, product ratings, certification marks, ISED statements, mobile-app safety prompts, packaging, and service documents should be translated and legally reviewed for Canadian English/French use. Quebec deployments may require additional French prominence and contract or consumer-document review.
gap.zh: 文件差距若未提前规划，通常会在后期才显现：警告、安装人员说明、产品额定值、认证标志、ISED声明、移动应用安全提示、包装及服务文件均应翻译并按加拿大英法双语使用进行法律审查。魁北克部署可能还需要额外审查法语显著性以及合同或消费者文件。
gap.zht: 文件差距若未提前規劃，通常會在後期才顯現：警告、安裝人員說明、產品額定值、認證標誌、ISED聲明、流動應用安全提示、包裝及服務文件均應翻譯並按加拿大英法雙語使用進行法律審查。魁北克部署可能還需要額外審查法語顯著性以及合同或消費者文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation where federal or provincial language, packaging, consumer, electrical approval, procurement, or Quebec rules apply. CSA, certification-body, and procurement documentation expectations are technical or contractual routes unless incorporated by law or contract.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese-language domestic documentation does not replace Canada-market English/French documentation

source.publisher: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada / Competition Bureau Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Canada-market EV charger files should not ship with Chinese-only or English-only safety documentation by default. Plan English/French labels, manuals, warnings, ISED statements, and consumer information as part of the compliance file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】加拿大市场电动汽车充电设备文件不应默认仅提供中文或仅英文安全文件。应将英法双语标签、说明书、警告、ISED声明和消费者信息纳入合规文件规划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】加拿大市場電動汽車充電設備文件不應默認僅提供中文或僅英文安全文件。應將英法雙語標籤、說明書、警告、ISED聲明和消費者資訊納入合規文件規劃。
